event__client_information.address: 2450 Harbor View Blvd, Suite 310, San Francisco, CA 94123

location__schedule.event_description:
The Spring Arts & Innovation Gala is an evening fundraising event hosted by the Bayview Community Arts Foundation to support free arts education and after-school programs for youth in the Bayview and Hunters Point neighborhoods. The event brings together local artists, community leaders, technology partners, and long-time supporters for a program that combines contemporary art exhibitions, live performances, and interactive demonstrations showcasing how technology and traditional art practices can intersect.

Guests will arrive through the front lawn, where there will be a welcome reception with passed hors d’oeuvres, a small acoustic jazz trio, and a step-and-repeat photo backdrop highlighting student artwork. The multipurpose room will host a seated program that includes a brief welcome from our Executive Director, a 10-minute student documentary screening about our mural apprenticeship program, and a live auction of student and local artist pieces. Between speeches, there will be short performances by our youth dance collective and a spoken word artist who is an alumnus of our after-school program.

On the second floor courtyard, guests will be able to move freely between food and dessert stations, a silent auction table featuring donated works from local galleries, and an interactive ‘innovation corner’ where our teen media lab students will demonstrate simple digital drawing tablets and projection mapping on canvas. Throughout the evening, volunteers and staff will circulate with iPads to help guests make donations and sign up for monthly giving. All décor will be kept minimal and respectful of the existing architecture and artwork, with low floral centerpieces, battery-operated candles, and museum-compliant signage. No activities will involve touching existing artworks or altering gallery spaces, and all sound levels will be monitored to remain appropriate for a museum setting.

alcohol_service.name_of_alcohol_permit_holder_provider_s: Golden Gate Catering & Events, LLC (ABC License #48-327561)

vendors__services.musicians: Mission District Jazz Trio / YouthBeat Dance Collective
